title: Extruded Comic Font Poster
sourceTitle: Do This 4 Less Known Hidden Gem
prompt:
do this for 4 less known hidden gem European manga: class ComicDiorama:
    def __init__(self, franchise, era, sfx, bg):
        self.franchise  = franchise   # "[FRANCHISE]"
        self.era        = era         # "[YEAR]"
        self.sfx        = sfx         # "[ONOMATOPOEIA]"
        self. bg         = bg          # "[BG_COLOR_DESCRIPTOR]"
        self.scale      = "miniature_action_figure_fidelity"
        self.base       = "open_vintage_comic_book_spread"

    def base_platform(self):
        cover  = f"[{self.franchise}] cover art visible at front edge"
        pages  = "yellowed spread, original printed panels showing beneath scene"
        bridge = "3D figures ERUPT upward — page surface is the dimensional floor"
        return [cover, pages, bridge]

    def populate(self):
        hero    = "[HERO] — sculpted 3D figure, era-accurate costume, action pose"
        villain = "[VILLAIN] — era-accurate, facing hero in shared 3D space"
        env     = "[ENV_PROP] — physical miniature construction rising from page"
        return [hero, villain, env]

    def sfx_layer(self):
        return {
            "text":     self.sfx,
            "style":    "3D extruded bold comic font",
            "material": "high-gloss colored resin",
            "shadow":   "hard cast on page below",
            "tilt":     "[ANGLE]deg — dynamic, not static"
        }

    def badge(self):
        return f"YELLOW_RECT | '{self.franchise.upper()} | {self.era}' | black condensed"

panels = [
    ComicDiorama("[FRANCHISE_1]","[ERA_1]","[SFX_1]","[BG_1]"),
    ComicDiorama("[FRANCHISE_2]","[ERA_2]","[SFX_2]","[BG_2]"),
    ComicDiorama("[FRANCHISE_3]","[ERA_3]","[SFX_3]","[BG_3]"),
    ComicDiorama("[FRANCHISE_4]","[ERA_4]","[SFX_4]","[BG_4]"),
]

render_grid(
    panels  = panels,
    layout  = "2x2_quad",
    medium  = "3D_photorealistic_diorama_miniature",
    lens    = "45deg_overhead_isometric",
    light   = "studio_softbox + era_color_accent_per_panel"
)

promptTranslations.zh:
为四部少为人知的欧洲漫画制作漫画场景模型：
class ComicDiorama:
    def __init__(self, franchise, era, sfx, bg):
        self.franchise  = franchise   # "[FRANCHISE]"
        self.era        = era         # "[YEAR]"
        self.sfx        = sfx         # "[ONOMATOPOEIA]"
        self. bg         = bg          # "[BG_COLOR_DESCRIPTOR]"
        self.scale      = "miniature_action_figure_fidelity"
        self.base       = "open_vintage_comic_book_spread"

    def base_platform(self):
        cover  = f"[{self.franchise}] 封面艺术显示于前沿"
        pages  = "泛黄的漫画页，原印刷格子图像作为背景"
        bridge = "立体人物从页面中隆起——页面为维度地面"
        return [cover, pages, bridge]

    def populate(self):
        hero    = "[HERO] — 雕塑立体人物，时代服饰准确，动作姿势"
        villain = "[VILLAIN] — 时代服饰，面向英雄，空间共享立体视觉"
        env     = "[ENV_PROP] — 物理微型场景由页面构筑"
        return [hero, villain, env]

    def sfx_layer(self):
        return {
            "text":     self.sfx,
            "style":    "三维加粗漫画字体",
            "material": "高光彩色树脂材质",
            "shadow":   "投射硬阴影于页面",
            "tilt":     "[ANGLE]度 — 动态非静态"
        }

    def badge(self):
        return f"YELLOW_RECT | '{self.franchise.upper()} | {self.era}' | black condensed"

panels = [
    ComicDiorama("[FRANCHISE_1]","[ERA_1]","[SFX_1]","[BG_1]"),
    ComicDiorama("[FRANCHISE_2]","[ERA_2]","[SFX_2]","[BG_2]"),
    ComicDiorama("[FRANCHISE_3]","[ERA_3]","[SFX_3]","[BG_3]"),
    ComicDiorama("[FRANCHISE_4]","[ERA_4]","[SFX_4]","[BG_4]"),
]

render_grid(
    panels  = panels,
    layout  = "2x2_quad",
    medium  = "3D_photorealistic_diorama_miniature",
    lens    = "45deg_overhead_isometric",
    light   = "studio_softbox + era_color_accent_per_panel"
)

        pages  = "double page jaunie, planches originales imprimées visibles sous la scène"
        bridge = "figures 3D ÉRUPTENT vers le haut — la surface de la page est le sol dimensionnel"
        return [cover, pages, bridge]

    def populate(self):
        hero    = "[HERO] — figurine 3D modelée, costume époque, pose d’action"
        villain = "[VILLAIN] — époque précise, en face du héros dans l’espace 3D partagé"
        env     = "[ENV_PROP] — construction miniature physique surgissant de la page"

    def sfx_layer(self):

            "material": "résine colorée haute brillance",
            "shadow":   "ombre dure portée sur la page en dessous",
            "tilt":     "[ANGLE]deg — dynamique, non statique"
        }

    def badge(self):
        return f"RECTANGLE_JAUNE | '{self.franchise.upper()} | {self.era}' | noir condensé"

panels = [

]

promptTranslations.ru:
сделайте это для 4 малоизвестных скрытых жемчужин европейского манга:
class ComicDiorama:
    def __init__(self, franchise, era, sfx, bg):
        self.franchise  = franchise   # "[FRANCHISE]"
        self.era        = era         # "[YEAR]"
        self.sfx        = sfx         # "[ONOMATOPOEIA]"
        self. bg         = bg          # "[BG_COLOR_DESCRIPTOR]"
        self.scale      = "miniature_action_figure_fidelity"
        self.base       = "open_vintage_comic_book_spread"

    def base_platform(self):
        cover  = f"[{self.franchise}] обложка видна на переднем крае"
        pages  = "желтоватый разворот, оригинальные напечатанные панели видны под сценой"
        bridge = "3D-фигуры ВЫРЫВАЮТСЯ вверх — поверхность страницы служит трёхмерным полом"
        return [cover, pages, bridge]

    def populate(self):
        hero    = "[HERO] — скульптурная 3D-фигура, костюм эпохи, динамичная поза"
        villain = "[VILLAIN] — эпохально точный, обращён к герою в общем 3D-пространстве"
        env     = "[ENV_PROP] — физическая миниатюрная конструкция, поднимающаяся со страницы"
        return [hero, villain, env]

    def sfx_layer(self):
        return {
            "text":     self.sfx,
            "style":    "3D вытянутый жирный комиксный шрифт",
            "material": "глянцевая цветная смола",
            "shadow":   "жёсткая тень на странице снизу",
            "tilt":     "[ANGLE]deg — динамичный, не статичный"
        }

    def badge(self):
        return f"YELLOW_RECT | '{self.franchise.upper()} | {self.era}' | чёрный конденсированный"

panels = [
    ComicDiorama("[FRANCHISE_1]","[ERA_1]","[SFX_1]","[BG_1]"),
    ComicDiorama("[FRANCHISE_2]","[ERA_2]","[SFX_2]","[BG_2]"),
    ComicDiorama("[FRANCHISE_3]","[ERA_3]","[SFX_3]","[BG_3]"),
    ComicDiorama("[FRANCHISE_4]","[ERA_4]","[SFX_4]","[BG_4]"),
]

render_grid(

    layout  = "2x2_quad",
    medium  = "3D_photorealistic_diorama_miniature",
    lens    = "45deg_overhead_isometric",
    light   = "studio_softbox + era_color_accent_per_panel"
)

promptTranslations.ja:
以下の4つのあまり知られていない欧州漫画隠れ名作についてこれを実行してください:
class ComicDiorama:
    def __init__(self, franchise, era, sfx, bg):
        self.franchise  = franchise   # "[FRANCHISE]"
        self.era        = era         # "[YEAR]"
        self.sfx        = sfx         # "[ONOMATOPOEIA]"
        self. bg         = bg          # "[BG_COLOR_DESCRIPTOR]"
        self.scale      = "miniature_action_figure_fidelity"
        self.base       = "open_vintage_comic_book_spread"

    def base_platform(self):
        cover  = f"[{self.franchise}] 表紙アートが前端に見える"
        pages  = "黄色く変色した見開き、オリジナル印刷パネルがシーンの下に見える"
        bridge = "3Dフィギュアがページから立ち上がる — ページ面が立体の床"
        return [cover, pages, bridge]

    def populate(self):
        hero    = "[HERO] — 彫刻された3Dフィギュア、時代考証された衣装、アクションポーズ"
        villain = "[VILLAIN] — 時代考証された悪役、共有3D空間で主人公と対峙"
        env     = "[ENV_PROP] — ページから立体的に構築された物理的ミニチュア"
        return [hero, villain, env]

    def sfx_layer(self):
        return {
            "text":     self.sfx,
            "style":    "3D押出しボールドコミックフォント",
            "material": "高光沢カラーレジン",
            "shadow":   "ページ下に強く投影される影",
            "tilt":     "[ANGLE]度 — 動的で静的ではない"
        }

    def badge(self):
        return f"YELLOW_RECT | '{self.franchise.upper()} | {self.era}' | 黒のコンデンスドフォント"

panels = [
    ComicDiorama("[FRANCHISE_1]","[ERA_1]","[SFX_1]","[BG_1]"),
    ComicDiorama("[FRANCHISE_2]","[ERA_2]","[SFX_2]","[BG_2]"),
    ComicDiorama("[FRANCHISE_3]","[ERA_3]","[SFX_3]","[BG_3]"),
    ComicDiorama("[FRANCHISE_4]","[ERA_4]","[SFX_4]","[BG_4]"),
]

render_grid(
    panels  = panels,
    layout  = "2x2四分割",
    medium  = "3Dフォトリアリスティックジオラマミニチュア",
    lens    = "45度俯瞰アイソメトリック",
    light   = "スタジオソフトボックス + 各パネルに時代色のアクセント"
)
promptTranslations.ko:
덜 알려진 유럽 만화를 위한 아래 4가지 숨은 보석 콘텐츠를 만드세요: class ComicDiorama:
    def __init__(self, franchise, era, sfx, bg):
        self.franchise  = franchise   # "[FRANCHISE]"
        self.era        = era         # "[YEAR]"

        self. bg         = bg          # "[BG_COLOR_DESCRIPTOR]"
        self.scale      = "miniature_action_figure_fidelity"
        self.base       = "open_vintage_comic_book_spread"

        cover  = f"[{self.franchise}] 표지 아트가 앞 가장자리에 보임"
        pages  = "누렇게 변한 만화책 펼친 면, 원본 인쇄 패널이 장면 아래에 드러남"
        bridge = "3D 피규어가 위로 솟아오름 — 페이지 표면이 입체적 바닥"
        return [cover, pages, bridge]

    def populate(self):
        hero    = "[HERO] — 조각된 3D 피규어, 시기에 걸맞는 의상, 액션 포즈"
        villain = "[VILLAIN] — 시기 일치, 영웅과 마주보는 3D 공간 내 배치"
        env     = "[ENV_PROP] — 페이지에서 솟아오른 미니어처 물리적 구조"
        return [hero, villain, env]

    def sfx_layer(self):
        return {
            "text":     self.sfx,
            "style":    "3D 돌출 굵은 만화 글꼴",
            "material": "고광택 컬러 수지",
            "shadow":   "페이지 아래 강한 그림자",
            "tilt":     "[ANGLE]도 — 역동적이며 고정되지 않음"
        }

    def badge(self):
        return f"YELLOW_RECT | '{self.franchise.upper()} | {self.era}' | 검정 콤팩트 서체"

    ComicDiorama("[FRANCHISE_1]","[ERA_1]","[SFX_1]","[BG_1]"),

]

render_grid(

    medium  = "3D_photorealistic_diorama_miniature",
    lens    = "45deg_overhead_isometric",
